title: Tarzan and the Mermaids
writer: Carroll Young, Edgar Rice Burroughs, Albert DePina
actors: Johnny Weissmuller, Brenda Joyce, George Zucco
plot: To escape from an arranged marriage to Aquatania's pagan god, a desperate maiden ends up in Tarzan's fishing net. But soon, he, too, finds himself before a well-planned conspiracy. Can Tarzan save the mermaid from the barbaric ido...
